title: Mobile Session Restructure — C4 Model (simplified)
scope: Slim file-diff storage + wire; diff viewer feature removed; owned-diff via direct git

systems.name: OpenCode Daemon
systems.description: Per-user persistent process; hosts session storage, HTTP routes, SSE stream, git snapshot repo.

systems.name: Web / Mobile Client
systems.description: Browser-based client reading sessions. Renders metadata-only rows per changed file. No diff viewer.

systems.name: Enterprise Share Page
systems.description: Public share consumer. Metadata-only rows; no diff viewer.

containers.name: Main Daemon Process
containers.description: Owns storage, routes, git snapshot repo.

containers.name: Git Snapshot Repo
containers.description: Per-user shadow repo where each turn writes a commit. Source of truth for file contents history. Accessible to power users via git CLI when they really want to inspect what the AI did.

components.name: DiffGenerator
components.description: End-of-turn code that produces FileDiff[] entries. Metadata-only output; queries git numstat.

components.name: MessageStore
components.description: Existing Storage.update path. No code change needed; shape is automatically slim.

components.name: SessionReadRoutes
components.description: Existing HTTP + SSE surfaces. Return slim payloads because persisted shape is slim. No new on-demand route.

components.name: OwnedDiffChecker
components.description: Workspace integrity check. Calls git directly against message snapshot commits.

components.name: MigrationScript
components.description: NEW one-shot: walks session dir, rewrites message info.json records to slim, writes per-session marker.

components.name: FrontendSessionReview
components.description: Review tab + shared SessionReview component. Simplified: renders summary rows only. Expand panes deleted.

components.name: EnterpriseSharePage
components.description: Public share page simplified; metadata rows only.

relationships.label: writes slim FileDiff[] to user message summary
reads slim records for owned-diff check
renders slim payload as metadata rows
renders slim payload as metadata rows
